prerequisites: An active FastBill account with API access enabled.
The email address (username) associated with your FastBill account, used as the Basic Auth username.
Your FastBill API key, used as the Basic Auth password.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic Authentication (email + API key)
authMethods.summary: FastBill authenticates every request with HTTP Basic Authentication, submitting your FastBill account email address (the connector's username field) as the username and your API key (the connector's api_key field) as the password. Requests go to https://my.fastbill.com/api/1.0/api.php and are transmitted over SSL.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your FastBill API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your FastBill account, open Settings, and locate the API key. In FastBill Next this is under Settings -> Interfaces -> API-Key. Copy the key value.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials in the connector
setupSteps.body: Set username to the email address of your FastBill account and set api_key to the API key you copied. Both fields are required.

setupSteps.title: Verify the connection
setupSteps.body: FastBill applies these credentials as HTTP Basic Authentication against https://my.fastbill.com/api/1.0/api.php. Run the connection check to confirm the email and API key are accepted.

sources.title: FastBill Next public API documentation (API key location)
